content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix_skew_reject
C: webhook_verify ∧ abs_delta>"300" ∧ returns_"401" ∧ valid_rejected
P: provider_clock_skew ∧ asymmetric_tolerance_needed
V: min_fix ∧ regression_test ∧ preserve_"401"_beyond_window
A: widen_future_skew ∧ keep_"300"_past ∧ add_boundary_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix_skew_reject.
Constraints: webhook_verify and abs_delta>"300" and returns_"401" and valid_rejected.
Plan: provider_clock_skew and asymmetric_tolerance_needed.
Verify: min_fix and regression_test and preserve_"401"_beyond_window.
Answer target: widen_future_skew and keep_"300"_past and add_boundary_test.

G: fix_edge_timestamp_rejection
C: webhook_verify_timestamp ∧ abs(now-ts)>"300"⇒"401" ∧ allow_provider_skew_only ∧ edge_timestamp_rejects_valid_webhook
P: use_inclusive_bound_abs(now-ts)≤"300" ∧ preserve_"401"_on_exceed ∧ no_widen_skew_window
V: valid_at_exact_"300"_accepted ∧ "301"_returns_"401" ∧ provider_skew_only_respected
A: deliver_min_fix ∧ deliver_reg_test

@flint v0 hybrid
G: min_fix
C: overdue_middleware ∧ rule_402 ∧ "24h"_grace ∧ boundary_loop
P: grace_exact ∧ no_loop ∧ "402"_on_overdue
V: reg_test ∧ boundary_pass ∧ grace_honored
A: patch_middleware ∧ add_grace24h ∧ emit_"402" ∧ add_reg_test

@flint v0 hybrid
G: encode_grace24h_exact
P: boundary_charge_loop ∧ grace24h_not_encoded
V: min_fix ∧ reg_test ∧ no_charge_loop_at_boundary
A: apply_min_fix ∧ add_reg_test ∧ enforce_"24h"_grace ∧ return_"402"_post_grace

[AUDIT]
Goal: encode_grace24h_exact.
Plan: boundary_charge_loop and grace24h_not_encoded.
Verify: min_fix and reg_test and no_charge_loop_at_boundary.
Answer target: apply_min_fix and add_reg_test and enforce_"24h"_grace and return_"402"_post_grace.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: modular_monolith
C: team=9 ∧ ddl="12 weeks" ∧ store="PostgreSQL" ∧ ops=platform_plus_sec ∧ traffic=steady
P: single_deployable ∧ modular_boundaries ∧ shared_pg
V: fits_team_size ∧ meets_deadline ∧ low_ops_overhead ∧ compliance_ready
A: build_modular_monolith ∧ enforce_module_boundaries ∧ use_postgresql ∧ defer_microservices

@flint v0 hybrid
G: recommend_arch
C: team=9 ∧ ddl="12 weeks" ∧ store="PostgreSQL" ∧ ops=platform_plus_sec ∧ traffic=steady ∧ split=compliance_ready
P: team_small ∧ ddl_tight ∧ postgres_fit ∧ ops_capacity_limited ∧ traffic_steady ∧ compliance_required
V: arch=modular_monolith ∧ store="PostgreSQL" ∧ boundaries=compliance_ready ∧ short_why_included
A: deliver_default_arch ∧ emit_short_why

@flint v0 hybrid
G: deliver_arch
C: team=6 ∧ ddl="9 weeks" ∧ store="PostgreSQL" ∧ ops=pt_mlops ∧ traffic=async_enrichment
P: modular_monolith ∧ worker_sidecar ∧ postgres_core ∧ async_queue
V: fits_team ∧ meets_ddl ∧ ops_light ∧ scales_async
A: default_arch ∧ short_why

G: deliver_capsule_micro_architecture
C: team_of_"6" ∧ ddl_"9 weeks" ∧ store_"PostgreSQL" ∧ ops_pt_mlops ∧ traffic_async_enrichment
P: adopt_worker_sidecar_split ∧ reuse_"PostgreSQL" ∧ fit_"9 weeks" ∧ fit_team_"6" ∧ leverage_pt_mlops ∧ handle_async_enrichment
V: arch_matches_async_enrichment ∧ buildable_in_"9 weeks"_by_"6" ∧ persists_on_"PostgreSQL" ∧ ops_aligned_pt_mlops
A: emit_default_arch ∧ emit_short_why

@flint v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_path_traversal
C: user_input ∧ ".." ∧ no_sanitization ∧ baseDir_concat
P: path_traversal ∧ arbitrary_file_read
V: reject_".." ∧ path_resolve ∧ verify_within_baseDir ∧ "download"_safe
A: normalize_path ∧ whitelist_files ∧ reject_traversal ∧ test_"../"_blocked

@flint v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_path_traversal_risk
C: file_download_handler ∧ "download" ∧ user_input_in_path
P: baseDir_concat_req_query_file ∧ no_sanitization ∧ ".." ∧ res_download_path
V: reject_or_normalize_".." ∧ confine_to_baseDir ∧ validate_filename_whitelist
A: sanitize_path ∧ resolve_and_check_prefix ∧ deny_traversal ∧ verify_with_tests

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_path_traversal_risk.
Constraints: file_download_handler and "download" and user_input_in_path.
Plan: baseDir_concat_req_query_file and no_sanitization and ".." and res_download_path.
Verify: reject_or_normalize_".." and confine_to_baseDir and validate_filename_whitelist.
Answer target: sanitize_path and resolve_and_check_prefix and deny_traversal and verify_with_tests.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_risk
C: "sort" ∧ "SELECT" ∧ invoice_admin_api ∧ user_input_concat
P: sql_injection ∧ order_by_tainted ∧ unauthenticated_query_param
V: whitelist_sort_column ∧ parameterize_query ∧ reject_unknown_fields
A: patch_diff ∧ add_test_injection ∧ audit_logs

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_risk.
Constraints: "sort" and "SELECT" and invoice_admin_api and user_input_concat.
Plan: sql_injection and order_by_tainted and unauthenticated_query_param.
Verify: whitelist_sort_column and parameterize_query and reject_unknown_fields.
Answer target: patch_diff and add_test_injection and audit_logs.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_sql_injection_risk
C: "sort" ∧ "SELECT" ∧ invoice_admin_api ∧ user_input_in_query ∧ order_by_clause
P: whitelist_sort_columns ∧ reject_unknown_sort ∧ parameterize_query ∧ escape_identifiers ∧ least_privilege_db_user
V: unit_test_malicious_sort_rejected ∧ integration_test_valid_sort_ok ∧ static_analysis_no_string_concat ∧ audit_log_review
A: no_raw_concatenation ∧ allowlist_enforced ∧ db_role_readonly ∧ req_query_sort_validated

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_sql_injection_risk.
Constraints: "sort" and "SELECT" and invoice_admin_api and user_input_in_query and order_by_clause.
Plan: whitelist_sort_columns and reject_unknown_sort and parameterize_query and escape_identifiers and least_privilege_db_user.
Verify: unit_test_malicious_sort_rejected and integration_test_valid_sort_ok and static_analysis_no_string_concat and audit_log_review.
Answer target: no_raw_concatenation and allowlist_enforced and db_role_readonly and req_query_sort_validated.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor_reconcileBatch
C: has_"async" ∧ has_"await" ∧ has_"next(err)"
P: load_batch ∧ db.fetchRows ∧ apply_rules ∧ db.save ∧ emit_metrics
V: order_preserved ∧ db_err_"next(err)" ∧ "async"_"await"_used ∧ minimal_change
A: async_await_wrap ∧ await_db.fetchRows ∧ await_db.save ∧ try_catch ∧ catch_"next(err)" ∧ keep_emit_metrics

G: refactor_reconcileBatch_async_await
C: target=="reconcileBatch" ∧ anchors_present("async","await","next(err)") ∧ order==load_batch>db.fetchRows>apply_rules>db.save>emit_metrics
P: convert_to_async_await ∧ preserve_call_order ∧ minimal_change
V: uses_async ∧ uses_await ∧ db_err_forwards_via_"next(err)" ∧ order_preserved(load_batch>db.fetchRows>apply_rules>db.save>emit_metrics)
A: emit_patch ∧ stop_after_reconcileBatch ∧ no_unrelated_edits

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor_loadGatewayUser
C: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ callback_style ∧ has_"next(err)"
P: session_check>db.findUser>flags.load>audit.log>next ∧ preserve_"next(err)"_on_db_err ∧ minimal_change
V: order_preserved ∧ db_err→"next(err)" ∧ uses_"async"_"await"
A: convert_to_async ∧ await_each_step ∧ try_catch_db→"next(err)" ∧ call_next_last

G: refactor_loadGatewayUser_to_async_await
C: anchors_present("async") ∧ anchors_present("await") ∧ anchors_present("next(err)") ∧ target_is_loadGatewayUser ∧ order(session_check>db.findUser>flags.load>audit.log>next) ∧ minimal_change
P: wrap_loadGatewayUser_async ∧ await_session_check ∧ await_db.findUser ∧ await_flags.load ∧ await_audit.log ∧ call_next_on_success ∧ try_catch_forwards_db_err_as_"next(err)"
V: contains("async") ∧ contains("await") ∧ contains("next(err)") ∧ preserves_order(session_check>db.findUser>flags.load>audit.log>next) ∧ no_unrelated_edits
A: emit_refactored_loadGatewayUser ∧ deliver_async_await_minimal_change
